catalog_metadata.authority_model: Derived context catalog only. Canonical source documents govern conflicts; this catalog supplements but never overrides canonical definitions.

context_artifacts.purpose: Canonical registry of all EAFIX modules. Work cell parent_module values resolve here.
Canonical process step definitions and handoff contracts.
Aligned trading process specification and phase sequencing.
Canonical UI screen and gateway definitions.
MT4 platform constraints and execution semantics.
Machine routing instructions for selecting project knowledge documents.

work_cells.purpose: Serialize broker order envelopes, write and validate CSVs atomically, watch directories, retry transport operations, and support socket fallback.
validation_gates: Atomic write+rename (no partial reads); sequence + hash; idempotent resend

work_cells.purpose: EA-side socket, FastAPI, CSV, JSON, and legacy static profile bridge behavior.
validation_gates: Atomic write+rename (no partial reads); sequence + hash; idempotent resend

work_cells.purpose: Read execution requests, validate inbound CSV structure, perform pre-flight checks, call OrderSend, classify MT4 errors, and apply retry or abort policy.
validation_gates: EA contains no strategy/risk logic; only execution

work_cells.purpose: EA-side OrderSend wrapper, execution response classification, result writing, and MQL4 error handling.
validation_gates: EA contains no strategy/risk logic; only execution

work_cells.purpose: Parse feedback CSVs, de-duplicate broker events, order feedback deterministically, and map results into ExecutionReport or PositionSnapshot contracts.
Module boundary context packet seed for Bar Builder. This module is not decomposed further in Phase 1 beyond canonical input/output contracts and routing constraints.
Module boundary context packet seed for Indicator Engine. This module is not decomposed further in Phase 1 beyond canonical input/output contracts and routing constraints.
validation_gates: Deterministic rounding; indicator params pinned by config snapshot

work_cells.purpose: Module boundary context packet seed for Feature Packager. This module is not decomposed further in Phase 1 beyond canonical input/output contracts and routing constraints.
validation_gates: Exact declared feature set; stable ordering

work_cells.purpose: Module boundary context packet seed for Market Feed Adapter. This module is not decomposed further in Phase 1 beyond canonical input/output contracts and routing constraints.
validation_gates: Timestamp freshness; symbol normalization; reject malformed

work_cells.purpose: Own source registry handling, endpoint selection, calendar polling, raw payload parsing, and source error classification.
Normalize time zones, impact values, event names, de-duplication keys, and standard calendar identifiers such as CAL5 and CAL8.
validation_gates: UTC conversion success; impact in enum; dedup policy applied

work_cells.purpose: Compute anticipation windows, symbol impact, freshness and TTL checks, suppression metadata, and calendar trigger emission.
validation_gates: No duplicate trigger for event+offset; TTL rules applied

work_cells.purpose: Classify close results and timeouts into canonical outcome buckets.
validation_gates: Only enumerated buckets; stable bucket mapping

work_cells.purpose: Resolve next relevant event, calculate proximity buckets, and guard against calendar conflicts.
Load the reentry matrix, pin the correct version, build lookup keys, apply fallbacks, and validate the matrix decision.
validation_gates: Deterministic fallback hierarchy; matrix version pinned

work_cells.purpose: Enforce generation limits, chain-state constraints, spread guards, and build reentry intent or suppression contracts.
validation_gates: Hard cap: no reentry beyond R2; no circular chains

work_cells.purpose: Module boundary context packet seed for Configuration Service. This module is not decomposed further in Phase 1 beyond canonical input/output contracts and routing constraints.
validation_gates: Schema validate; stable ordering; hash snapshot

work_cells.purpose: Module boundary context packet seed for Flow Orchestrator. This module is not decomposed further in Phase 1 beyond canonical input/output contracts and routing constraints.
validation_gates: Chain depth < configured max; velocity limits; idempotency keys enforced

work_cells.purpose: Persist normalized events through an append-only writer with idempotency guards, stream publication, and backup artifact creation.
validation_gates: Idempotent by message_id; ordered by created_utc + tie-breaker

work_cells.purpose: Module boundary context packet seed for Clock Scheduler. This module is not decomposed further in Phase 1 beyond canonical input/output contracts and routing constraints.
Module boundary context packet seed for Order Router. This module is not decomposed further in Phase 1 beyond canonical input/output contracts and routing constraints.
Module boundary context packet seed for OMS State Machine. This module is not decomposed further in Phase 1 beyond canonical input/output contracts and routing constraints.
validation_gates: Idempotent fills; out-of-order handling per policy; stable final state

work_cells.purpose: Module boundary context packet seed for Trade Close Classifier. This module is not decomposed further in Phase 1 beyond canonical input/output contracts and routing constraints.
validation_gates: Close reason enum; deterministic PnL rounding rules

work_cells.purpose: Module boundary context packet seed for Health Aggregator. This module is not decomposed further in Phase 1 beyond canonical input/output contracts and routing constraints.
Validate per-symbol, per-strategy, and account-level position limits.
validation_gates: Idempotent for same inputs; deterministic sizing + rounding

work_cells.purpose: Evaluate aggregate portfolio exposure before order compilation.
validation_gates: Idempotent for same inputs; deterministic sizing + rounding

work_cells.purpose: Validate margin and free-margin constraints for candidate trades.
validation_gates: Idempotent for same inputs; deterministic sizing + rounding

work_cells.purpose: Block or suppress trades that breach correlation guardrails.
validation_gates: Idempotent for same inputs; deterministic sizing + rounding

work_cells.purpose: Evaluate spread and slippage constraints before risk approval.
validation_gates: Idempotent for same inputs; deterministic sizing + rounding

work_cells.purpose: Apply risk-off, drawdown, kill-switch, and emergency stop circuit breakers.
validation_gates: Idempotent for same inputs; deterministic sizing + rounding

work_cells.purpose: Prevent duplicate order decisions and repeated risk approvals.
validation_gates: Idempotent for same inputs; deterministic sizing + rounding

work_cells.purpose: Compute deterministic position sizing from policy, account, and signal context.
validation_gates: Idempotent for same inputs; deterministic sizing + rounding

work_cells.purpose: Assemble final RiskDecision output and suppression reasons.
validation_gates: Idempotent for same inputs; deterministic sizing + rounding

work_cells.purpose: Module boundary context packet seed for Order Intent Compiler. This module is not decomposed further in Phase 1 beyond canonical input/output contracts and routing constraints.
EA-side signal trigger, validation, conflict management, signal export to bridge, and monitoring of MT4 feedback.
validation_gates: Suppression reasons enumerated; no sizing/broker specifics

work_cells.purpose: Generate ECO_HIGH and ECO_MED signals from calendar and feature context.
validation_gates: Suppression reasons enumerated; no sizing/broker specifics

work_cells.purpose: Generate 1-hour and 8-hour anticipation signals.
validation_gates: Suppression reasons enumerated; no sizing/broker specifics

work_cells.purpose: Generate equity open signals.
validation_gates: Suppression reasons enumerated; no sizing/broker specifics

work_cells.purpose: Generate all-indicator signals.
validation_gates: Suppression reasons enumerated; no sizing/broker specifics

work_cells.purpose: Compute confidence scores for emitted or candidate signals.
validation_gates: Suppression reasons enumerated; no sizing/broker specifics

work_cells.purpose: Map signal suppression reasons to canonical suppressed signal contracts.
validation_gates: Suppression reasons enumerated; no sizing/broker specifics

work_cells.purpose: Validate emitted and suppressed signal records.
validation_gates: Suppression reasons enumerated; no sizing/broker specifics

work_cells.purpose: Module boundary context packet seed for Intent Builder. This module is not decomposed further in Phase 1 beyond canonical input/output contracts and routing constraints.
validation_gates: Stable correlation_id from Signal; constraints + rationale attached

work_cells.purpose: Package REST API endpoint context for UI-facing gateway behavior.
derivation_notes: Gateway endpoint work cell from decomposition_model UI guidance.
work_cells.dependency_scope_override_note: DEPENDENCY SCOPE: Use this work cell's own allowed_dependencies and forbidden_dependencies. Do not derive dependency constraints from parent module SHARED_LIBS in module_catalog.json. SHARED_LIBS is used as a Phase 1 parent proxy because module_catalog.json defines no dedicated canonical UI module. File scope is governed by this work cell's service_scope metadata and ui_catalog.json.
